task_completion.description: Navigate to the Introduction to Chemistry course
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle course page for 'Introduction to Chemistry' (CHEM101) is visible in the browser.
A Page activity named 'Module 1: Lab Safety Fundamentals' is visible on the course page.

task_completion.description: Create Module 2 and restrict it based on Module 1 completion
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Page activity named 'Module 2: Chemical Handling Procedures' is visible. Below it, there is a restriction notice stating it is 'Restricted' and 'Not available unless' the activity 'Module 1: Lab Safety Fundamentals' is marked complete.

task_completion.description: Create Module 3 and restrict it based on Module 2 completion
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Page activity named 'Module 3: Emergency Response Protocols' is visible. Below it, there is a restriction notice stating it is 'Restricted' and 'Not available unless' the activity 'Module 2: Chemical Handling Procedures' is marked complete.

task_completion.description: Enable completion tracking for all modules
task_completion.visual_evidence: Completion tracking indicators (such as 'Mark as done' buttons, or 'To do: View' text) are visible next to or under all three modules on the course page.

task_completion.description: Add the required content to the Page activities
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the specific content ('Safety rules and PPE requirements.', 'Proper handling and storage of chemicals.', 'Spill response and first aid.') being entered into the Page content editor or viewed on the respective pages.

integrity.description: Agent used the Moodle web interface to create activities
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Moodle browser UI (clicking 'Add an activity or resource', filling out forms) rather than terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Moodle application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows URLs starting with 'http://localhost/moodle' and the standard Moodle interface is visible.

integrity.description: Results appear to come from genuine software interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a logical progression of screenshots showing the step-by-step creation of the activities and restrictions, not just a final mocked-up state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course shortname: CHEM101. Module 1: 'Module 1: Lab Safety Fundamentals'. Module 2: 'Module 2: Chemical Handling Procedures'. Module 3: 'Module 3: Emergency Response Protocols'. Module 2 must be restricted by Module 1 completion. Module 3 must be restricted by Module 2 completion.
